ddls:
CREATE TABLE "electricians" (
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrician */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Licensed electrician number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the electrician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the electrician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the electrician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the electrician */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the electrician */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent) of the electrician */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the electrician */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the electrician's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the electrician's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician who holds the license */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Journeyman, Master) */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the license */,
  "renewal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of license renewal (e.g., annually, biennially) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the electrician */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the electrician is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the electrician is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the electrician's location */,
  "secondary_phone" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the electrician */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business rule */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is mandatory */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules associated with the business rule */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the business rule (e.g., Licensing, Contact Information) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the business rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the business rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated business rule */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation to be performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the validation rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES business_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business rule */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES business_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician's record */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made during the audit */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the auditor */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the administrator's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the administrator's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public report */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the person making the report */,
  "reporter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the person making the report */,
  "reporter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the person making the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_reports_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license renewal application */,
  "electrician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electrician applying for renewal */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "renewal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the renewal application */,
  "renewal_fee" TEXT /* Fee paid for the renewal */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Check) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the renewal application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the renewal application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_renewals_electrician_id FOREIGN KEY ("electrician_id") REFERENCES electricians ("electrician_id")
)
